creator: nobutaka@nobutaka.com
text:
This is a port of Eterm-0.8.7 .

Eterm is a color vt102 terminal emulator for X Window system.
It is supports pixmap and pseudo-transparent background. It
is also supports Japanese input with XIM (X Input Method) 
protocol. If you want to input Japanese, use "--input-method"
and "--preedit-type" option. 

If you have a comment about Japanese input support for Eterm and
this port, contact with MANTANI Nobutaka <nobutaka@nobutaka.com>.

Eterm Main Web Site -- <http://www.tcserv.com/Eterm/>
Eterm FAQ -- <http://www.tcserv.com/Eterm/FAQ.html>
